---
title: "Priti Malik Devi"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: files/pictures/people/PDevi_s.jpg
  image-alt: "Priti Malik Devi"
  links:
    - icon: mortarboard-fill
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=xn5DDF4AAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:Priti.Devi@leibniz-fli.de
---

## Bio

Priti Malik Devi is a microbiologist and genomicist working at the intersection of infectious disease, host-microbiome interactions, and functional genomics. Her research focuses on how microbial signatures and host factors — in particular antimicrobial peptides — modulate microbial community composition during aging in *Nothobranchius furzeri*.

## Education

**CSIR Institute of Genomics and Integrative Biology** | New Delhi, India

Ph.D. in Biological Sciences | August 2020 – January 2025

**Maharshi Dayanand University** | Rohtak, India

Master's Degree in Genetics

## Experience

**Leibniz Institute on Aging** | Postdoc | January 2026 – Present

**CSIR Institute of Genomics and Integrative Biology** | Project Scientist | April 2025 – December 2025
